subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast been gladdened by the fragrances of God! I convey unto thee greetings and praise with a heart overflowing with love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استبشر بنفحات الله و اننی اهدی الیک التحیه و الثناء بقلب طافح بمحبه
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
